title: Create a rule that doesn't allow you to change a status to done without the checklist being completed
excerpt: I want to create a rule that doesn’t allow the status of a task be changed to complete/done until the checklist is completed

posts.author: andrea_jared (Andrea Jared)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to create a rule that doesn’t allow the status of a task be changed to complete/done until the checklist is completed

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @andrea_jared - to clarify, is this a checklist you’re creating within the updates section of your item?
